challenges.title: Fixed Header
challenges.description: Create a fixed header that stays at the top of the page when scrolling. The header should be 60px tall, have a dark background with white text, and the page content should not be hidden behind it.
requirements: Header must use position: fixed
Header should be full width
Content must not hide behind header
Header should have z-index to ensure it stays on top

solution.html:
Fixed Header

Content goes here...
solution.explanation: Padding-top on body prevents content from being hidden behind the fixed header.

challenges.title: Overlay a Badge on a Card
challenges.description: Create a product card with a 'Sale' badge positioned at the top-right corner using absolute positioning.
requirements: Card container must have position: relative
Badge must use position: absolute
Badge should be at top-right corner
Badge should have a distinct color

solution.html:
Product Image
Sale!
solution.explanation: The card has position: relative to act as a containing block. The badge uses position: absolute with top and right offsets to stick to the top-right corner.

challenges.title: Modal Dialog with Overlay
challenges.description: Create a modal dialog that appears centered on screen with a semi-transparent overlay behind it. The modal should be closable.
requirements: Overlay must cover entire viewport using fixed positioning
Modal content must be centered both vertically and horizontally
Include a close button positioned in the top-right of the modal
Modal should have a z-index higher than the overlay

solution.html:
Modal Title

This is a modal dialog example.
solution.explanation: The overlay uses fixed positioning to cover the viewport. Flexbox centers the modal. The close button is absolutely positioned within the modal (which has position: relative).

challenges.title: Sticky Section Headers
challenges.description: Create a list with section headers that stick to the top when scrolling through content sections.
requirements: Each section must have a sticky header
The header should stick when its section is scrolled into view
Create at least 3 sections with content
The container should have a fixed height with scroll

solution.html:
Section A
Content A
Section B
Content B
Section C
Content C
solution.explanation: Each section-header uses position: sticky with top: 0. When scrolling, the header sticks to the top of the container until its section is scrolled past.

challenges.title: Full Page Layout with All Position Types
challenges.description: Create a full-page layout that demonstrates all five position types working together: static for content, relative for containers, absolute for badges/labels, fixed for navbar, and sticky for section headers.
requirements: Fixed navigation bar at top
Hero section with relative container and absolutely positioned overlay text
Content sections with sticky sub-headers
Product cards with absolute badges
A fixed 'back to top' button

solution.html:
Navbar (Fixed)

Hero Section

Overlay (Absolute)
Products (Sticky Header)
New
Product 1
Sale
Product 2
Hot
Product 3
↑
solution.explanation: This page combines all position types: fixed navbar and back-to-top button, relative hero with absolute overlay, sticky section header, and static default for body content with relative cards containing absolute badges.
